titleStmt.title: SII 16.308: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 308. (A.R. No. 382 of 1920.) MĀRNĒPALLI, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up near the Āñjanēya temple.
This is dated Śaka 1525 (current), Śubhakṛit, Mārgaśira ba. 7, corresponding to 1602 A.D., November 25.

It records gift of the village Marinēpalli in the Pulēṭi-māgāṇi of Gutti-sīma to god Raghunāyaka of Gutti-durgam, by Alluḍu Rāmarājayyadēva-mahārāju, who is said to have obtained Gutti-sīma as his amara-nāyaṅkara from the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayabudaya śālivāhana ṣkavaru
ṣaṁbulu 1525 AguAnēṭi śubakrutu saṁ
vatsaraṁ mārgaśira ba 7 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja
śrī vīrapratapa śrī vīra veṁkaṭapatidēvamaha
rāyalugāru vajrasiṁhvāsānarudulayi penugoṁḍa nagara
maṁdu pṛuthisāṁbrajaṁ cēyucuṁḍāgānu Alluḍu
rāmarājayyadēvamahārājulugāru tamaku Amara
nāyaṁkrānaku pāliṁcina guttidurggaṁ raghanāyaku
Amrutapaḍiki samarpiṁcina guttisīmalōni pulēṭi māga
nu marinēnipallegrāmaṁ darapōsina dānapatraṁśāsanaṁ
rmānaku yavaru ganaka Āsiṁcinānu dēvata drōha
gurudrōhulu tamatallitaṁḍrini vāraṇāsilōnu vadhi
ṁcina pāpāna pōduru . śrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.308 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
